title: 2.5m Car Jump Leads - 200Amp Jump Leads for Car Heavy Duty Battery Booster Jumper Cables Colour Coded Clamps For Petrol Diesel Car Van Truck - 2.5 Metres (200A)
features: BOOSTER CABLES - 200 Amp 2.5m long car battery jump leads.
HEAVY DUTY - Colour coded heavy duty jump leads clamps for your convenience and security.

THICKENED AND INSULATED - Heavy duty clamps with highly conductive thickened jump cables for long lasting use; insulated to be heat resistant & prevent short circuiting. CE certified and RoHS compliant.
STORAGE BAG - These GADLANE 200amp Jump Leads for car, van & truck come in a convenient storage zip bag that can be easily stored in your vehicle ready for emergencies.
description: Product Description Crocodile Clips These colour coded jump start cables come with four heavy duty alligator clips which make it a breeze to connect! Compatible with vehicles up to 2.0 L or 2000CC. Made to Last Our pure-pressure copper cables deliver stable current, dependable performance, and excellent conductivity. This weather-resistant set is ideal for harsh environments. Thickened and Insulated These highly conductive thickened jump cables are made of durable PVC coating to prevent corrosion, cracks, and tangles. They are insulated to be heat resistant & prevent short circuiting. GADLANE 2.5m Car Jump Leads - Step by Step GADLANE 2.5m Car Jump Leads - 200 Amp Colour coded heavy duty clamps for your convenience and security, presented in a handy storage bag making it easy to store when not in use. Heavy duty clamps with highly conductive thickened cables for long lasting use, insulated to prevent short circuiting and oil, acid and heat resistant PVC. CE certified and RoHS compliant. 200A, 2.5m Booster Cables developed to jump start large vehicles with an engine size up to 2000cc.
